response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 0.15 below threshold but our policy requires minimum 0.55 SoC before sharing; our neighbors are also depleted and we must preserve islanded grid stability—escalate request to urgent if your SoC drops below 0.40.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
